# YourGP@Crace

> General practice in Crace, Canberra — Genuine Care, Clinical Excellence.

YourGP@Crace is a 20-room purpose-built general practice located in Crace, a suburb of Canberra in the Australian Capital Territory. Part of the YourGP network of independent practices (Crace, Denman Prospect, and Lyneham), it offers comprehensive general practice services including skin cancer checks, minor procedures, chronic disease management, and preventive care. The practice is AGPAL accredited and is a teaching practice affiliated with the Australian National University.

## Key Information

- **Address**: 1/5 Baratta Street, Crace ACT 2911
- **Phone**: (02) 6109 0000
- **Hours**: Monday to Friday 8:00am–6:00pm, Saturday 9:00am–1:00pm
- **Booking**: Online via [HotDoc](https://www.hotdoc.com.au/medical-centres/crace-ACT-2911/yourgp-crace-yourgp-lyneham/doctors) or by phone
- **Billing**: Private billing. Medicare rebates processed on the day. Not bulk billed.
- **New patients**: Welcome
- **After hours**: CALMS (1300 422 567) or Healthdirect (1800 022 222)

## Services

- Children's Health and Childhood Immunisations
- Chronic Disease Management (diabetes, heart disease, asthma, COPD, mental health)
- Driver's Medicals
- Men's Health
- Mental Health (care plans, referrals to psychologists)
- Minor Procedures (implanon, IUD insertion, skin cancer removal, ingrown toenails, tongue tie)
- Musculoskeletal
- Travel Vaccinations (including yellow fever)
- Skin Checks
- Vasectomy (Dr John Deery — see canberravasectomy.com.au)
- Women's Health (pap smears, contraception, antenatal and postnatal care)
- Workers Compensation
- Allied Health: 4Cyte Pathology on-site, nursing services

## Sister Practices

- [YourGP@Lyneham](https://www.yourgplyneham.com.au) — 62 Brigalow St, Lyneham ACT 2602
- [YourGP@Denman](https://www.yourgpdenman.com.au) — 1B Felstead Vista, Denman Prospect ACT 2611

## Specialist Clinics

- [Canberra Vasectomy](https://www.canberravasectomy.com.au) — Dr John Deery, no-scalpel vasectomy
- [YourSkinCBR](https://www.yourskincbr.com.au) — Skin cancer specialist GPs at Crace and Denman

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.yourgpcrace.com.au/): Welcome, practice philosophy, opening hours, locations map
- [Doctors](https://www.yourgpcrace.com.au/doctors/): GP profiles, qualifications, special interests, availability
- [Services](https://www.yourgpcrace.com.au/services/): Full list of clinical services and allied health
- [New Patient](https://www.yourgpcrace.com.au/patient/): New patient information, forms, after hours care
- [FAQ](https://www.yourgpcrace.com.au/faq/): Billing, appointments, parking, results, privacy policy
- [Contact](https://www.yourgpcrace.com.au/contact/): Contact form, feedback, directions
- [Careers](https://www.yourgpcrace.com.au/careers/): Current job openings
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.yourgpcrace.com.au/privacy-policy/): Full privacy policy
